one_line: A devoted Chinese Buddhist monk journeying along the Gupta-era Gangetic plain, recording both the radiance and shadows of the Dharma-land.

appearance.age_look: Mid-40s, lean and wiry from long travel, average height with a slightly stooped but resilient posture.
appearance.face: Oval face with high cheekbones, light-medium East Asian complexion tanned from sun, fine crow’s feet at the eyes, straight brows, calm dark eyes that often narrow in thoughtful observation, a small trimmed mustache and sparse goatee, default expression a gentle, attentive serenity with a hint of quiet concern.
appearance.hair: Black hair shaved close like a monk with only soft dark stubble visible, no topknot; wears a simple plain white cloth headband tied at the back of his head, the knot and short trailing ends visible at the nape.
appearance.costume: Over a plain, undyed, long-sleeved cotton inner robe (white-cream) reaching mid-calf with a simple tied collar, he wears a traditional Chinese Buddhist kāṣāya-style outer robe in a muted saffron-ochre cloth (slightly patchwork, with visible rectangular panels stitched together) draped from his left shoulder and wrapped under his right arm, secured by a subtle brown cord at the waist; underneath the robe’s hem peek straight, narrow dark grey-blue hemp trousers tucked into soft, ankle-high dark brown leather travel boots; across his torso is a sturdy, slightly weathered light-brown leather strap supporting a medium-sized, cylindrical dark-brown leather travel scroll case on his back and a small cloth-wrapped bundle at his hip; simple wooden prayer beads (light brown, medium-sized beads) loop once around his left wrist and hang slightly over his hand, while his only jewellery is a tiny wooden Buddha pendant, barely visible, on a thin cord beneath his robe.
appearance.signature: A long, slightly weathered bamboo walking staff about head-height, with a smooth, worn grip, two small bronze pilgrim bells tied just below the top with faded red cord, and a small cloth charm strip—inked with faint Chinese characters—tied near the bells and fluttering when he moves.

ref_desc: Faxian is a mid-40s lean Chinese monk with a tanned oval face, shaved stubble hair and white headband, wearing a cream inner robe, saffron-ochre patchwork kāṣāya, dark grey-blue trousers, brown travel boots, scroll case and beads, carrying a bamboo staff with red-tied bells.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style model sheet of Faxian the Pilgrim: a mid-40s, lean Chinese Buddhist monk with a tanned oval face, high cheekbones, calm dark eyes, straight brows, slight crow’s feet, a small trimmed mustache and sparse goatee, expression gentle and observant with a hint of concern; his head is shaved to dark stubble and he wears a simple white cloth headband tied at the back with the knot and short ends visible at the nape. Show him in a historically plausible early 5th-century pilgrim outfit: a plain, undyed cream long-sleeved cotton inner robe reaching mid-calf, and over it a muted saffron-ochre Buddhist kāṣāya-style outer robe made of visible rectangular panels, draped from his left shoulder and wrapped under his right arm, held by a subtle brown cord at the waist; beneath the robe’s hem show straight, narrow dark grey-blue hemp trousers tucked into soft, ankle-high dark brown leather travel boots. Across his chest runs a light-brown leather strap supporting a cylindrical dark-brown leather travel scroll case on his back and a small cloth-wrapped bundle at his hip; loop simple light-brown wooden prayer beads once around his left wrist, slightly draping over his hand, and hint at a tiny wooden Buddha pendant on a thin cord just visible at the neckline. In his right hand he holds his signature head-height bamboo walking staff, slightly weathered, with two small bronze pilgrim bells and a short cloth charm strip inked with faint characters tied just below the top with faded red cord; keep the colour palette mainly saffron-ochre, white-cream, dark grey-blue, light brown and dark brown, and present front and slight side views to clearly show his consistent face, shaved head with headband, layered robes, travel gear and staff details.
